content: Patch 12i: per-category dilation budget for tight torso crops
Define _DILATE_PCT_BY_CATEGORY table in clothing_parser.py with tight budgets for top/bottom/dress/accessory and free budgets for footwear/headwear
Add category param to apply_alpha_intersection() with backward-compat default
Update 3 production call sites: garment_vision._matte_crops, closet._run_background_matte, closet /clean-background
Unit smoke test: 32/32 passed (19 resolver + 7 end-to-end + 1 backward-compat + 5 semantic)
